properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Before you now, In the beauty of Your presence And as I bow You surround me with Your radiance

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: I worship :/ you! /: I worship :/ you!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Before you now As Your loving arms enfold me, I am in awe At the wonder of Your glory!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I've surrendered to Your call upon my heart! I am captured by your passion and desire!
